faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have more questions? Contact our support team.

items.title: How accurate are the AI readings?
items.description: Our AI is trained on traditional Bazi principles and modern data analysis, providing highly accurate readings based on your birth date and time. The system continuously learns and improves from thousands of user interactions.

items.title: What information do I need to provide?
items.description: We only need your birth date, time, and location to generate accurate readings. Your information is kept strictly confidential and protected with enterprise-grade security.

items.title: How often are readings updated?
items.description: Daily luck readings are updated every day, while detailed forecasts are provided monthly or as specified in your chosen plan. Premium members receive additional weekly insights.

items.title: Can I get readings for different aspects of life?
items.description: Yes! We offer specialized readings for love, career, wealth, and general destiny. Each reading type focuses on specific aspects of your life with detailed insights and guidance.

items.title: How is LuckBox different from traditional fortune telling?
items.description: LuckBox combines ancient Chinese astrology with AI technology to provide objective, data-driven insights. Our system analyzes thousands of traditional texts and modern cases to deliver accurate, personalized readings.

items.title: Is my first reading really free?
items.description: Yes! We offer a comprehensive free destiny reading for all new users. This includes a basic analysis of your life path, relationships, career, and wealth aspects.

items.title: Can I upgrade or change my plan later?
items.description: Absolutely! You can upgrade to Premium at any time to access more detailed readings and features. You can also downgrade or cancel your subscription whenever you want.

items.title: Do you offer customer support?
items.description: Yes, we provide 24/7 customer support through email and chat. Premium members also get priority support with faster response times.
